identity: Human female rogue, shoulder-length black hair mostly hidden under a hood, pale skin, sharp grey eyes glinting from under the hood, lean nimble build.
outfit: Black leather cowl and hooded cloak (hood UP, shadowing the upper face), dark leather vest over a grey tunic, black gloves and belts crossing the chest holding throwing knives. Dark trousers, soft silent boots.
weapons: Twin curved steel daggers, one in each hand, held in reverse grip.
attackStyle: East-facing. Forward lunge, right-hand dagger thrust forward, left-hand dagger cocked back at hip. Cloak trailing behind.
spellStyle: East-facing. Both arms crossed at the chest, daggers out, a ripple of purple shadow-magic swirling from her body outward.
blockStyle: East-facing. Both daggers raised in an X shape in front of the face, blades crossed. Chin down, crouched low.
koStyle: East-facing, sprawled on the ground, one dagger fallen beside her, hood fallen back revealing black hair.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), low crouched idle. Daggers held in reverse grip at her sides, hood shadowing the eyes.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Hood UP, only mouth and sharp grey eyes visible, crossed dagger-belts on chest.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human female rogue, shoulder-length black hair mostly hidden under a hood, pale skin, sharp grey eyes glinting from under the hood, lean nimble build.

OUTFIT: Black leather cowl and hooded cloak (hood UP, shadowing the upper face), dark leather vest over a grey tunic, black gloves and belts crossing the chest holding throwing knives. Dark trousers, soft silent boots.

WEAPONS: Twin curved steel daggers, one in each hand, held in reverse grip.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human female rogue, shoulder-length black hair mostly hidden under a hood, pale skin, sharp grey eyes glinting from under the hood, lean nimble build.

OUTFIT: Black leather cowl and hooded cloak (hood UP, shadowing the upper face), dark leather vest over a grey tunic, black gloves and belts crossing the chest holding throwing knives. Dark trousers, soft silent boots.

WEAPONS: Twin curved steel daggers, one in each hand, held in reverse grip.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Hood UP, only mouth and sharp grey eyes visible, crossed dagger-belts on chest.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
